reasoning: Player sprite is approximately 32x32px. The echo_box_idle_v07 summon in the dark arena area presents a visual footprint of roughly 90-110px wide x 60-75px tall (including its dark mass/tentacle spread), placing it at ~280-340% of player size. Summons must be 50-80% of player (target ~16-26px), so this entity is roughly 4x over the upper bound. Even discounting the dark ambient effects and measuring only the box body (~50px), it still exceeds 150% of player — still a clear violation. Secondary issue: the entity reads as a flat frontal-perspective sprite composited onto a top-down tile floor, creating a perspective mismatch with the player and environment. Scene feel skews toward wallpaper/background prop rather than toy-diorama summon companion.
